obligation.goal:
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p)

proofs: generalize dependent env. induction p; simpl; unfold embed_frm; simpl.

goals.goal:
forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (relation_interpret R (interpret_trms STRUCTURE env (embed_trms ts)))
  (relation_interpret R
     (interpret_trms (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env ts))

forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1))
     (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2)))
  (eqProp (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1)
     (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2))

hypotheses:
IHp : forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p)
goals.goal:
forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (not
     (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env
        ((fix embed_frm (p : frm L) :
              frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) :=
            match p with
            | Rel_frm R ts => Rel_frm R (embed_trms ts)
            | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => Eqn_frm (embed_trm t1) (embed_trm t2)
            | Neg_frm p1 => Neg_frm (embed_frm p1)
            | Imp_frm p1 p2 => Imp_frm (embed_frm p1) (embed_frm p2)
            | All_frm y p1 => All_frm y (embed_frm p1)
            end) p)))
  (not (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p))

hypotheses:
IHp2 : forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p2))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p2)

IHp1 : forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p1))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p1)
goals.goal:
forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (forall
     _ : interpret_frm STRUCTURE env
           ((fix embed_frm (p : frm L) :
                 frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) :=
               match p with
               | Rel_frm R ts => Rel_frm R (embed_trms ts)
               | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => Eqn_frm (embed_trm t1) (embed_trm t2)
               | Neg_frm p1 => Neg_frm (embed_frm p1)
               | Imp_frm p1 p2 => Imp_frm (embed_frm p1) (embed_frm p2)
               | All_frm y p1 => All_frm y (embed_frm p1)
               end) p1),
   interpret_frm STRUCTURE env
     ((fix embed_frm (p : frm L) :
           frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) :=
         match p with
         | Rel_frm R ts => Rel_frm R (embed_trms ts)
         | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => Eqn_frm (embed_trm t1) (embed_trm t2)
         | Neg_frm p1 => Neg_frm (embed_frm p1)
         | Imp_frm p1 p2 => Imp_frm (embed_frm p1) (embed_frm p2)
         | All_frm y p1 => All_frm y (embed_frm p1)
         end) p2))
  (forall _ : interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p1,

hypotheses:
IHp : forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p)
goals.goal:
forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (forall y_value : domain_of_discourse,
   interpret_frm STRUCTURE (upd_env y y_value env)
     ((fix embed_frm (p : frm L) :
           frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) :=
         match p with
         | Rel_frm R ts => Rel_frm R (embed_trms ts)
         | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => Eqn_frm (embed_trm t1) (embed_trm t2)
         | Neg_frm p1 => Neg_frm (embed_frm p1)
         | Imp_frm p1 p2 => Imp_frm (embed_frm p1) (embed_frm p2)
         | All_frm y p1 => All_frm y (embed_frm p1)
         end) p))
  (forall y_value : domain_of_discourse,
   interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) (upd_env y y_value env)
     p)

attempts:
destruct (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) as [eq' refl' sym' trans']. induction p as [R ts | t1 t2 | p1 IHp1 | p1 IHp1 p2 IHp2 | y p1 IHp1]; simpl.
- apply (relation_interpret_preserves_eqProp STRUCTURE). apply restrict_structure_trms.
- split; intro H;
  [ apply trans' with (y := interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1)) (z := interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2)); [apply sym'; apply restrict_structure_trm | exact H | apply restrict_structure_trm]
  | apply trans' with (y := interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1) (z := interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2); [apply restrict_structure_trm | exact H | apply sym'; apply restrict_structure_trm] ].
- destruct IHp1 as [AB BA]; split; [ intro HnotA; intro HB; apply HnotA; apply BA; exact HB | intro HnotB; intro HA; apply HnotB; apply AB; exact HA ].
- destruct IHp1 as [AC CA]; destruct IHp2 as [BD DB]; split; [ intro Himp; intro HC; apply BD; apply Himp; apply CA; exact HC | intro Himp; intro HA; apply DB; apply Himp; apply AC; exact HA ].
- split; intro Hall; intro y_value; [ destruct (IHp1 y_value) as [AB BA]; apply AB; apply Hall | destruct (IHp1 y_value) as [AB BA]; apply BA; apply Hall ].

generalize dependent env. induction p; simpl; unfold embed_frm; simpl.
- rewrite interpret_trms_embed; firstorder.
- rewrite !interpret_trm_embed; firstorder.
- specialize (IHp env); firstorder.
- specialize (IHp1 env); specialize (IHp2 env); firstorder.
- split; intros H x; apply (IHp (upd_env y x env)); apply H.

generalize dependent env; induction p; unfold restrict_structure; simpl; try reflexivity; all: intro env;
  match goal with
  | [ |- eqProp (not _) (not _) ] => rewrite (IHp env); reflexivity
  | [ |- eqProp (_ -> _) (_ -> _) ] => rewrite (IHp1 env); rewrite (IHp2 env); reflexivity
  | [ |- eqProp (forall _, _) (forall _, _) ] => setoid_rewrite (IHp env); reflexivity
  end.
failed_attempts:
destruct (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) as [eq' refl' sym' trans']. induction p as [R ts | t1 t2 | p1 IHp1 | p1 IHp1 p2 IHp2 | y p1 IHp1]; simpl.
- apply (relation_interpret_preserves_eqProp STRUCTURE). apply restrict_structure_trms.
- split; intro H;
  [ apply trans' with (y := interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1)) (z := interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2)); [apply sym'; apply restrict_structure_trm | exact H | apply restrict_structure_trm]
  | apply trans' with (y := interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1) (z := interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2); [apply restrict_structure_trm | exact H | apply sym'; apply restrict_structure_trm] ].
- destruct IHp1 as [AB BA]; split; [ intro HnotA; intro HB; apply HnotA; apply BA; exact HB | intro HnotB; intro HA; apply HnotB; apply AB; exact HA ].
- destruct IHp1 as [AC CA]; destruct IHp2 as [BD DB]; split; [ intro Himp; intro HC; apply BD; apply Himp; apply CA; exact HC | intro Himp; intro HA; apply DB; apply Himp; apply AC; exact HA ].
- split; intro Hall; intro y_value; [ destruct (IHp1 y_value) as [AB BA]; apply AB; apply Hall | destruct (IHp1 y_value) as [AB BA]; apply BA; apply Hall ].

generalize dependent env; induction p; unfold restrict_structure; simpl; try reflexivity; all: intro env;
  match goal with
  | [ |- eqProp (not _) (not _) ] => rewrite (IHp env); reflexivity
  | [ |- eqProp (_ -> _) (_ -> _) ] => rewrite (IHp1 env); rewrite (IHp2 env); reflexivity
  | [ |- eqProp (forall _, _) (forall _, _) ] => setoid_rewrite (IHp env); reflexivity
  end.

value.proof_prefix: generalize dependent env. induction p; simpl; unfold embed_frm; simpl. admit.

proofs: intro env. pose proof (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1) as H1. pose proof (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2) as H2. split.

hypotheses:
H2 : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2))
  (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2)

H1 : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1))
  (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1)
goals.goal:
forall
  _ : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1))
        (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2)),
eqProp (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1)
  (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2)

hypotheses:
H2 : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2))
  (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2)

H1 : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1))
  (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1)
goals.goal:
forall
  _ : eqProp (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1)
        (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2),
eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1))
  (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2))

attempts: refine (fun env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse => conj (fun (H : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1)) (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2))) => eqProp_trans (eqProp_sym (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1)) (eqProp_trans H (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2))) (fun (H : eqProp (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1) (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2)) => eqProp_trans (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1) (eqProp_trans H (eqProp_sym (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2))))).

intro env. pose proof (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1) as H1. pose proof (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2) as H2. split.
- intro H. apply (eqProp_trans (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ _ (eqProp_trans (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ _ (eqProp_sym (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ H1) H) H2).
- intro H. apply (eqProp_trans (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ _ (eqProp_trans (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ _ H1 H) (eqProp_sym (equation_interpret STRUCTURE) _ _ H2)).

intros env. pose (lemma := (fix f (t : trm L) : interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t) = interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t :=
  match t with
  | Var_trm x => eq_refl
  | Fun_trm f' ts => f_equal (function_interpret f')
      ((fix g (n : nat) (ts' : trms L n) :
           interpret_trms STRUCTURE env (embed_trms n ts') = interpret_trms (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env ts' :=
        match ts' with
        | O_trms => eq_refl
        | S_trms n0 t' ts'' =>
            f_equal2 (Vector.VCons n0)
              (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t'))
              (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t')
              (interpret_trms STRUCTURE env (embed_trms n0 ts''))
              (interpret_trms (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env ts'')
              (f t')
              (g n0 ts'')
        end) (function_arity_table L f') ts)
  | Con_trm c => eq_refl
  end)). rewrite (lemma t1), (lemma t2). split; auto.

intro env. assert (H : forall (t : trm L), interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t = interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t)) by (induction t; simpl; auto; f_equal; apply IHt). rewrite (H t1), (H t2). split; auto.
failed_attempts: refine (fun env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse => conj (fun (H : eqProp (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t1)) (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t2))) => eqProp_trans (eqProp_sym (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1)) (eqProp_trans H (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2))) (fun (H : eqProp (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t1) (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t2)) => eqProp_trans (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t1) (eqProp_trans H (eqProp_sym (restrict_structure_trm STRUCTURE env t2))))).

intros env. pose (lemma := (fix f (t : trm L) : interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t) = interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t :=
  match t with
  | Var_trm x => eq_refl
  | Fun_trm f' ts => f_equal (function_interpret f')
      ((fix g (n : nat) (ts' : trms L n) :
           interpret_trms STRUCTURE env (embed_trms n ts') = interpret_trms (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env ts' :=
        match ts' with
        | O_trms => eq_refl
        | S_trms n0 t' ts'' =>
            f_equal2 (Vector.VCons n0)
              (interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t'))
              (interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t')
              (interpret_trms STRUCTURE env (embed_trms n0 ts''))
              (interpret_trms (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env ts'')
              (f t')
              (g n0 ts'')
        end) (function_arity_table L f') ts)
  | Con_trm c => eq_refl
  end)). rewrite (lemma t1), (lemma t2). split; auto.

intro env. assert (H : forall (t : trm L), interpret_trm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env t = interpret_trm STRUCTURE env (embed_trm t)) by (induction t; simpl; auto; f_equal; apply IHt). rewrite (H t1), (H t2). split; auto.

hypotheses:

hypotheses:
IHp : forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
eqProp (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env (embed_frm p))
  (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p)
obligation.goal:
forall env : forall _ : ivar, domain_of_discourse,
iff
  (not
     (interpret_frm STRUCTURE env
        ((fix embed_frm (p : frm L) :
              frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) :=
            match p with
            | Rel_frm R ts => Rel_frm R (embed_trms ts)
            | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => Eqn_frm (embed_trm t1) (embed_trm t2)
            | Neg_frm p1 => Neg_frm (embed_frm p1)
            | Imp_frm p1 p2 => Imp_frm (embed_frm p1) (embed_frm p2)
            | All_frm y p1 => All_frm y (embed_frm p1)
            end) p)))
  (not (interpret_frm (restrict_structure STRUCTURE) env p))

proofs: generalize dependent env. induction p; simpl; unfold embed_frm; simpl.
